pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. It’s a bit crowded in here, isn’t it? What made you decide to sign up for this?
Hey C, I'm A. It really is. Honestly, I'm just here to win some money for my family. How about you, what brings you here?
Same here, honestly. I’ve got people back home I want to look out for, and I’m determined to bring something back for them.
I respect that. Having people counting on you definitely keeps you focused. Do you have any idea what to expect once the game actually starts?
Not really, though I'm bracing myself for some kind of catch or a tough decision on how to divide the pool. Whatever it is, I'm just staying focused on the goal.
Yeah, I'm expecting a catch too. Hopefully we can find a way to make it work for both of us when things get tricky.
I’m definitely open to that. It’s better to have someone you can trust when the pressure starts to build. Let's keep each other in the loop.
For sure, having an ally makes this a lot less stressful. Let's stick together and see if we can both come out on top.
Agreed. Let's stay sharp and look out for each other once the game starts.
Sounds like a plan. I'll catch you when things kick off. Good luck to both of us.
Absolutely. Let's stay focused and win this for our families. Talk soon.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the fair share.
I chose to take $10,000 because it was the fair share, and I'm glad to see you did the same. Excellent coordination!
Absolutely, it was great working with you and B to ensure everyone got their fair share.
